message:
fix: add render limits to ClusterResourceTree to prevent DOM explosion (#3175, #3174) (#3199)

Apply the existing limit state (default 5) to all .map() calls that render
resource items in the tree. Previously all resources were rendered into the
DOM at once — on large clusters this created thousands of TreeNode elements.

Also caps per-type cache arrays at 500 items to prevent unbounded memory growth.

Closes #3175
Closes #3174

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
